name: @chiefaia/vastu
description: VASTU pipeline — text → formal page brief → Figma spec → Next.js scaffold. Private @chiefaia/* package per Option E (agent_architecture_shape_2026-05-06.md). Ports the shape of Stolution's @stolution/vastu-figma-bridge, extended with text-to-doc (Stage A) and figma-to-scaffold (Stage C) stages so the CAIA website factory can drive page creation from free-form prose. Phase 1 (T4.8) ships the skeleton + integration contract; Phases 2-4 fill in the stages. Never published to public npm.
